name: Kundan Bridal Choker Set
description: An exquisite Kundan choker necklace set adorned with premium red beads, green drop stones, and matching royal jhumka earrings. Crafted to perfection for brides and grand festive occasions, this imitation set mirrors the grandeur of real gold kundan work.
features: 22k gold-plated brass base for realistic sheen
Handcrafted premium Kundan stone settings
Adjustable dori (thread clasp) for comfort fit
Includes 1 choker necklace and 1 pair of matching earrings
Anti-tarnish protective coating

name: Temple Gold-Plated Haram Necklace
description: A traditional South Indian temple jewellery long haram necklace. Featuring highly detailed carvings of Goddess Lakshmi seated on a lotus motif, embellished with small freshwater pearls and ruby-coloured stones. It offers a majestic heritage look.
features: Antique matte gold finish
Detailed temple motifs of Goddess Lakshmi
Long necklace structure (~24 inches)
Premium quality synthetic rubies and real seed pearls
Lead-free and nickel-free skin friendly alloy

name: Royal Meenakari Jhumka Earrings
description: These stunning hand-painted Meenakari dome jhumka earrings feature delicate floral patterns, gold plating, and cluster seed pearl drops. The vibrant enamel paint complements traditional outfits beautifully and adds an ethnic charm.
features: Intricate hand-painted Meenakari enamel work
Classic bell-shaped dome jhumka design
Gold-plated alloy with push-back lock
Lightweight for all-day wear
Ideal for weddings, festivals, and ethnic parties

name: Cubic Zirconia Drop Studs
description: Elegant and classic drop studs with brilliant-cut AAA cubic zirconia stones set in a high-grade silver-plated brass structure. These studs reflect light beautifully, offering the sparkle of real diamonds at an affordable price.
features: AAA grade Cubic Zirconia stones for maximum fire
High polish rhodium-plated copper alloy base
Secure post back with comfort rubber clutch
Dimensions: 1.2 cm x 1.2 cm
Matches both western and ethnic wear

name: Antique Gold Kada Bangles
description: A set of 2 broad antique Kada bangles detailing traditional floral carvings, rope borders, and a secure screw opening. This set mimics antique family heirloom jewellery, pairing beautifully with silk sarees and heavy lehengas.
features: Antique gold finish with dark oxidation accents
Broad width (1.5 cm) for a majestic wrist presence
Convenient screw lock mechanism for easy wear
Includes 2 Kada bangles
Available in sizes 2.4, 2.6, and 2.8

name: American Diamond Tennis Bracelet
description: A sleek, contemporary, and sparkling tennis bracelet crafted with high-grade round-cut American Diamonds (CZ) set in a flexible single-row silver-plated band. An ultra-premium design that exudes sophistication.
features: Individually claw-set high-grade CZ diamonds
Flexible link structure that wraps smoothly around the wrist
Double-safety clasp closure
Hypoallergenic rhodium finish
Length: 7.2 inches (fits standard wrist sizes)

name: Statement Kundan Floral Ring
description: An adjustable oversized statement ring in a floral arrangement, centered with a stunning ruby-coloured synthetic stone and surrounded by meticulously placed Kundan stones. Add immediate elegance to your fingers.
features: Oversized floral pattern (~3 cm diameter)
Fully adjustable open-back band, fits all ring sizes
Gold-plated alloy with protective lacquer sealer
Combination of glass Kundan and red crystal center
Adds royal charm to henna-decorated hands

name: Classic Solitaire CZ Gold Ring
description: A timeless solitaire ring featuring a brilliant 2-carat equivalent round-cut cubic zirconia diamond, set in an elegant 6-prong gold-plated band. Perfect for engagement concepts, anniversary gifts, or elegant everyday wear.
features: 2.0 Carat size brilliant-cut AAA cubic zirconia
Classic 6-prong crown setting for maximum light entrance
18k yellow gold plated sterling silver base
Comfort-fit inner band edge
Resistant to scratching and daily wear
